surfaces.title: Interactive approvals
surfaces.notes: Gemini CLI folds sir's internal ask verdict into deny with remediation text.

surfaces.title: File-write pre-gating
surfaces.notes: BeforeTool gates write_file / replace posture mutations before execution.

surfaces.title: Shell classification
surfaces.notes: Bash commands are classified for egress, DNS, persistence, sudo, and install risk.

surfaces.title: MCP tool hooks
surfaces.notes: sir sees both MCP arguments and MCP responses on this agent.

surfaces.title: Delegation gating
surfaces.notes: Gemini CLI exposes no SubagentStart-equivalent hook.

surfaces.title: Config change detection
surfaces.notes: Gemini CLI exposes no ConfigChange-equivalent hook.

surfaces.title: InstructionsLoaded scanning
surfaces.notes: Gemini CLI exposes no InstructionsLoaded-equivalent hook.

surfaces.title: Elicitation interception
surfaces.notes: Gemini CLI exposes no Elicitation-equivalent hook.

surfaces.title: Terminal posture sweep
surfaces.notes: SessionEnd closes single-turn blind spots with one last sentinel sweep.
